channel.title: FilmyChill — New Movies & OTT Releases This Week in the UAE
channel.description: What's worth watching this week in the UAE — new theatre and OTT releases with ratings and verdicts. Updated twice daily.

item.title: Ikka — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Hindi · Just released — verdict soon — With a loved one's life at stake, a celebrated lawyer must defend a man he suspects is guilty — battling his conscience every step of the way.

item.title: Smoking Behind the Supermarket with You — Crunchyroll
item.description: Crunchyroll · Japanese · Just released — verdict soon — Sasaki is an overworked salaryman drifting through the corporate grind, sustained by cigarettes and the cheerful service and smile of Yamada, the clerk at his…

item.title: Dhamaal 4 — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Hindi · Just released — verdict soon — The Dhamaal boys are back for another treasure hunt, facing hilarious challenges in their quest for the Treasure of Life.

item.title: I, Nobody — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Malayalam · Just released — verdict soon — Rajeevan, an ordinary government employee, witnesses something he was never meant to see and is thrust into the centre of a serious crime.

item.title: Saga of Tanya the Evil — Crunchyroll
item.description: Crunchyroll · Japanese · ★ 8.2 · Must watch — On the front lines of the war, Tanya Degurechaff, blond hair, blue eyes, and porcelain white skin, commands her squad with lisping voice.

item.title: Evil Dead Burn — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 7.0 · Worth a watch — After her husband's abrupt death, a woman seeks solace with her in-laws. As they transform into Deadites one by one, she comes to discover that the vows she…

item.title: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Japanese · ★ 8.5 · Must watch — When a 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a truck, his story doesn't end there. Reincarnated in a new world as an infant, Rudy will seize every…

item.title: Simpsley — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 8.0 · Must watch — When penniless con-artist Marge Bouvier is sent to Italy to convince wealthy sap Seymour Skinner to come home, she’s tempted by the trappings of his affluent…

item.title: Silo — Apple TV
item.description: Apple TV · English · ★ 8.2 · Must watch — In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously,…

item.title: Super Subbu — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Telugu · Not enough ratings yet — An unlucky teacher is assigned to teach sex ed in a hostile village. Can he balance this secret while chasing his dreams and saving his relationship?

item.title: Isakapatnam — Amazon Prime Video
item.description: Amazon Prime Video · Telugu · Not enough ratings yet — Set in the 1990s, in the ruthless port town of Isakapatnam, three forces collide—a woman driven by justice, a henchman torn by loyalty, and a common man hungry…

item.title: Enola Holmes 3 — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · English · ★ 7.0 · Worth a watch — Adventure follows detective Enola Holmes to Malta, where her plans to tie the knot unravel when Sherlock's disappearance plunges her into a perilous case.

item.title: Alliance — Amazon Prime Video
item.description: Amazon Prime Video · Hindi · Not enough ratings yet — A competitive captive reality show blending high-stakes strategy, economy and psychological warfare.

item.title: Supergirl — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.2 · Decent one-time watch — When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an…

item.title: Minions & Monsters — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.3 · Decent one-time watch — This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters…

item.title: House of the Dragon — OSN+
item.description: OSN+ · English · ★ 8.4 · Must watch — The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights.

item.title: The Furious — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Chinese · ★ 7.5 · Must watch — After a criminal network kidnaps Wang Wei's daughter and the corrupt police refuse to assist him, Wei sets out on his own to locate her.
